channel.title: TryPwnMe One on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in TryPwnMe One on My New Hugo Site

item.title: TryOverflowMe 1
item.author: email@example.com (abund4nt)
item.description: We are provided with a 64-bit binary, its source code and a remote instance to connect to. int main(){ setup(); banner(); int admin = 0; char buf[0x10]; puts("PLease go ahead and leave a comment :"); gets(buf); if (admin){ const char* filename = "flag.txt"; FILE* file = fopen(filename, "r"); char ch; while ((ch = fgetc(file)) != EOF) { putchar(ch); } fclose(file); } else{ puts("Bye bye\n"); exit(1); } } The binary has the following protections.

item.title: TryOverflowMe 2
item.author: email@example.com (abund4nt)
item.description: Se nos proporciona un binario, el codigo fuente y una instancia remota para conectarnos. int read_flag(){ const char* filename = "flag.txt"; FILE* file = fopen(filename, "r"); if(!file){ puts("the file flag.txt is not in the current directory, please contact support\n"); exit(1); } char ch; while ((ch = fgetc(file)) != EOF) { putchar(ch); } fclose(file); } int main(){ setup(); banner(); int admin = 0; int guess = 1; int check = 0; char buf[64]; puts("Please Go ahead and leave a comment :"); gets(buf); if (admin==0x59595959){ read_flag(); } else{ puts("Bye bye\n"); exit(1); } } El binario cuenta con las siguientes protecciones.
